items.title: Sources: Meta buys Moltbook, a social network for AI agents, for an undisclosed fee, set to close in mid-March, and hires creators Matt Schlicht and Ben Parr (Ina Fried/Axios)
items.title_en: Sources: Meta buys Moltbook, a social network for AI agents, for an undisclosed fee, set to close in mid-March, and hires creators Matt Schlicht and Ben Parr (Ina Fried/Axios)
items.title_zh: 资料来源：Meta 以未公开的费用收购了人工智能代理社交网络 Moltbook，预计将于 3 月中旬关闭，并聘请了创作者 Matt Schlicht 和 Ben Parr（Ina Fried/Axios）

items.title: Meta's Oversight Board calls for an AI content moderation overhaul, saying current methods are not "comprehensive enough" to handle misinformation in a conflict (Jess Weatherbed/The Verge)
items.title_en: Meta's Oversight Board calls for an AI content moderation overhaul, saying current methods are not "comprehensive enough" to handle misinformation in a conflict (Jess Weatherbed/The Verge)
items.title_zh: Meta 的监督委员会呼吁对人工智能内容审核进行彻底改革，称当前的方法不够“全面”，无法处理冲突中的错误信息（Jess Weatherbed/The Verge）
